```java
package com.example.service;

import java.sql.Connection;
import java.sql.DriverManager;
import java.sql.SQLException;

public class DatabaseService {

    public Connection connectToDatabase(String url, String username, String password) throws SQLException {
        if (url == null || url.trim().isEmpty()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Database URL cannot be null or empty");
        }
        return DriverManager.getConnection(url, username, password);
    }
}
```
</fixed_code>
```

**Analysis:**

- Validates the URL parameter
- Provides clear error messages
- Prevents database connection attempts with invalid URLs
- Maintains the original functionality while making the code more robust
